nodes.label: AI transcription accuracy for technical terms
nodes.grounding_span: AI essentially replaced the core skill you and your colleagues had developed

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I've seen an uptick in errors within reports, and those do impact patient care

nodes.label: AI freeing time for human-centric work
nodes.label_negative: AI causing job loss and economic disruption
nodes.grounding_span: If we can get to a point as a society that AI is able to reliably produce accurate, high quality work on menial, administrative, mathematical/data-driven etc tasks, that would free humans up to do work that is personally resonant

nodes.label: AI as meeting note-taking tool
nodes.label_negative: AI in therapeutic recording and summarization
nodes.grounding_span: I'm leery of the function I've seen some utilize in which the session is recorded, with AI summarizing to generate notes

nodes.label: AI as tool requiring human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: AI is often only as good as the user's ability to apply wisdom and discretion in its use

nodes.label: Patient safety and quality of care
nodes.grounding_span: errors within reports, and those do impact patient care

nodes.label: Meaningful and resonant work
nodes.grounding_span: free humans up to do work that is personally resonant

nodes.label: Human connection and empathy
nodes.grounding_span: empathic connection and voice...communication with an individual who seems to truly care can make a dramatic impact

nodes.label: Professional pride and identity
nodes.grounding_span: We need to maintain our pride in what we do and the ethics of putting forth quality work

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for career advancement
Skepticism about AI replacing human therapy
nodes.grounding_span: I'm leery of the function I've seen some utilize in which the session is recorded

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: I do feel AI could be an asset in scheduling, in Telehealth management and billing/coding tasks

nodes.label: Concern about careless use of AI without review
nodes.grounding_span: I am concerned about the use of generative AI in the workforce and the laziness I have witnessed

nodes.label: Nuanced contextual reasoning — weighs pros and cons across domains
Empathic perspective-taking — focuses on human connection and care
